Name: sapdme_setpoint
Title: Setpoint Activities
Description: You can use this service to obtain setpoint parameters/indicators, write the values of setpoint parameters/indicators for machines and retrieve definitions for one or multiple setpoint groups. You can also create and delete setpoint groups.
